features: Luxury 300ml crème hand wash for beautifully cleansed hands
Luxury 300ml hand & body lotion to moisturise and delicately fragrances the hands and body
Baylis & Harding's Royale Garden Lavender & Rosehip Tea fragrance
description: Product Description Leave your skin beautifully cleansed and softly fragrance with our floral scented 300ml Bottle Crème Hand Wash and 300ml Bottle Hand & Body Lotion. The perfect addition to your everyday routine! Inspired by a quintessentially English country garden, this timeless combination of traditional heritage blooms and modern ditzy print creates a romantic fusion of the classic and contemporary. Infused with a beautiful floral bouquet of lavender and rose hip, and finished with pastel lilac, soft mint green tones and gold foil detailing, this is femininity at its finest A soothing and elegant blend, Lavender and Rosehip Tea captures the essence of calm and rejuvenation. Elegantly designed and inspired by the floral bouquet of an English country garden. Ingredients HAND WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Linalool, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Ci 17200 (Red 33), Ci 42090 (Blue 1).HAND & NAIL CREAM: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Lavandula Oil/ Extract, Limonene, Linalool, Ci 17200 (Red 33), Ci 42090 (Blue 1). Directions Crème Hand Wash - Lather And Rinse. Hand & Body Lotion - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
